page_content:
Introduction to Public Policy Focus or General Policy elective

3

challenges in the real world by engaging with the policy process at local, state and national levels through real-time projects.

Students may choose an area of focus or choose general policy related electives

The major in Public Policy at the University of Maryland equips students with competence in leadership and analytical skills, supported by theory and data, to prepare them for careers in public service, policymaking, and the public, private, and nonproﬁt sectors.
